title: pimpinella × subnigra
intro: Pimpinella × subnigra, also known as black caraway or lesser caraway, is a hybrid plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Pimpinella × subnigra include its ability to support digestive health, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, allowing for various forms of consumption and making it a convenient addition to a wellness routine.
